seo.title: Easy bread - just 3 ingredients - Marinda Kook

html: Now a warm loaf at the right time is like asking for more with jam.  The bread is so easy.  What you flavour it with or add to it is up to you.  Warm bread is love from the heart. Set your oven to 180 degrees Celsius and you're going to bake the bread for 1 hour.

recipe.title: Easy bread – just 3 ingredients
recipe.author: Marinda Engelbrecht

steps: Put the flour, salt and cheese in a mixing bowl and stir with a spoon until well combined.
Now stir in your buttermilk (or beer) until everything is combined. If you see that it still looks dry, stir in a little milk.
Put it in a greased bread pan and sprinkle 125ml cheese on top. If you're feeling brave you can sprinkle some cayenne pepper or paprika over it too.
Now bake the bread for around 60 minutes. After 45 minutes you can insert a knife and if it comes out dry your bread is done.

notes: Wherever I add the cheese, you can add anything you like: finely chopped rosemary, parsley, sweetcorn, sun-dried tomatoes, olives, or fine bokkoms. Whatever your tongue desires.
Enjoy your bread with jam or whatever your heart desires.
